items.title: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's Wedding Guests Picked a Color and Stuck to It
items.summary: WWD's round-up of guest fashion at the July 3 Taylor Swift-Travis Kelce wedding at Madison Square Garden identifies sportscaster Erin Andrews' black halter gown from Gucci Pre-Fall 2026 as the only confirmed Gucci presence among the largely monochrome guest looks; the bride and groom's own looks went to other houses (Dior).

items.title: Kering analyst consensus stays cautious, shares trade below key targets
items.summary: Market wire summarizing sell-side consensus on Kering (Gucci parent): rating clustered at Hold/Neutral among 24+ analysts, average 12-month price target around EUR 282 versus shares trading near EUR 266, with a wide EUR 175-360 target dispersion reflecting disagreement over whether Gucci's turnaround is taking hold.

items.title: US TikTok creators reassess Gucci Dionysus bag as a 'modern classic' buy
items.summary: Multiple US-focused TikTok bag-review videos resurfaced this week comparing the Gucci Dionysus against Saint Laurent, Prada and Loewe 'it' bags; recurring themes are praise for the buckle hardware and construction versus recurring complaints that the chain strap is heavy to wear for a full day. Reviewers increasingly frame it as a smart resale-value buy rather than a trend piece.

items.title: PurseForum thread tracking 2026 Gucci Flora reissues under Demna
items.summary: Active PurseForum community thread where collectors discuss the Flora print's return under Demna across nylon, coated canvas and silk twill pieces; members compare new releases to archival Flora editions and debate which silhouettes are worth buying versus skipping, continuing engagement with the Demna-era product strategy.

items.title: PurseForum authentication thread for secondhand Gucci pieces
items.summary: Ongoing PurseForum authentication-request thread where members submit secondhand-market Gucci pieces for community verification; steady volume of posts reflects continued active secondhand/resale trading of Gucci goods among US collectors, alongside routine counterfeit-vigilance activity in the community.
